This family includes a wide range of species, from cucumbers and melons to squash and pumpkins. Cucurbitella asperata is a species of climbing vine, and its classification is further broken down into the order Cucurbitales and the class Magnoliopsida. The health benefits of Cucurbita pepo include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been associated with reducing the risk of various diseases, including cancer, diabetes, and cardiovascular disease.
